title: delphinium exaltatum var. californicum
intro: Delphinium exaltatum var. californicum, also known as the California larkspur, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Delphinium exaltatum var. californicum include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
